# alicloudextend_live_domain_ipv6 (Resource)

Manages the IPv6 configuration for an ApsaraVideo Live domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "alicloudextend_live_domain_ipv6" "example" {
  domain_name = "play.example.com"
  switch      = "on"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain_name` (String) The live domain name.
- `switch` (String) Whether to enable IPv6. Valid values: on, off.



## Import

Import is supported using the domain name:

```shell
terraform import alicloudextend_live_domain_ipv6.example play.example.com
```
